Residential Stucco in Caldwell County, TX

Caldwell County is experiencing steady growth as families and builders look beyond Austin for affordable land and small-town living. Star Stucco of Austin installs residential stucco systems across Lockhart, Luling, and surrounding communities — finishes that add curb appeal and stand up to the region's clay soils and Central Texas weather.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Quality Stucco for Caldwell County's Growing Market

Caldwell County sits southeast of Austin along the SH 130 corridor, where new residential development is expanding alongside the county's traditional agricultural communities. Lockhart, the county seat and Texas's barbecue capital, has seen a surge of interest from homeowners and builders looking for value within commuting distance of Austin.

The county's Blackland Prairie soils are some of the heaviest clay in Central Texas. This dense, expansive soil swells when wet and contracts when dry, creating foundation movement that cracks exterior finishes not designed for the conditions. Our stucco systems include reinforcement and control joints specifically placed to absorb this movement.

Whether your home is in one of Lockhart's new subdivisions, on a family lot near Luling, or on acreage between the two, we deliver stucco installation that handles Caldwell County's ground conditions and climate.

What's Included With Our Residential Stucco in Caldwell County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Home Exterior Assessment

We evaluate wall conditions, foundation type, drainage, and soil characteristics to select the right stucco system for your Caldwell County home.

Substrate Prep & Barrier

Old finishes are removed or prepped, surfaces are cleaned, and a weather barrier is installed for long-term moisture protection.

Reinforced Lath & Scratch Coat

Metal lath is fastened with extra attention to corners and openings where clay-soil stress concentrates. The scratch coat is keyed and cured before the next layer.

Brown Coat Leveling

The brown coat creates a flat, true surface and builds the stucco wall to proper thickness for durability and finish quality.

Finish Coat Application

Your chosen texture and color are hand-applied for a consistent finish that resists fading and wear in Central Texas conditions.

Completion Walkthrough

We walk the finished project with you, confirm your satisfaction, clean the site, and provide warranty and maintenance documentation.

Common Residential Stucco Needs in Caldwell County

Caldwell County homeowners rely on us for stucco that handles the area's challenging clay soils and delivers lasting curb appeal.

New Construction Stucco

Builders in Lockhart's expanding developments choose us for residential stucco that meets timeline demands without compromising finish quality.

Siding Replacement with Stucco

Older Caldwell County homes with vinyl or wood siding gain better protection and a modern look when converted to a full three-coat stucco system.

Expansive Soil Crack Prevention

The heavy Blackland clay in Caldwell County is notorious for cracking exterior surfaces. We engineer control joint placement and use flexible basecoats to mitigate this risk.

Matching Stucco on Additions

Room additions, covered patios, and garage extensions need stucco that matches the existing home. We sample and blend for a seamless transition.

Pre-Sale Exterior Improvements

With Lockhart's growing popularity, a quality stucco finish helps your home compete in a rising market where first impressions drive offers.

Why Choose Us for Residential Stucco in Caldwell County?

  • Specialized experience with Caldwell County's Blackland clay and its effects on exteriors
  • Reinforced stucco systems designed to resist soil-driven cracking
  • Transparent inspections — we show you what we find and explain what it means
  • Respectful crews who keep job sites clean in residential neighborhoods
  • Finishes that resist heat, UV, and the heavy rains common in this part of Central Texas
  • Free estimates with clear pricing and no commitment required

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Caldwell County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Residential Stucco Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Call for a Free Estimate

Reach us at (512) 706-9699 or online. We schedule Caldwell County visits regularly and will find a time that suits you.

2

Home Inspection

Our estimator reviews your exterior walls, soil conditions, and foundation details to build a stucco plan tailored to your property.

3

Proposal & Pricing

You get a written proposal with itemized costs, materials, timeline, and warranty terms — clear and straightforward.

4

Quality Installation

Our crew executes the stucco work on schedule, maintains open communication, and delivers a finished product you can be proud of.
